subject: Received
body:
Thank you,
Please optimal clear all blockers and gaps.
Continue

On Sun, Apr 5, 2026, 7:07 PM CC Ascendant <paybackh1@gmail.com> wrote:

> CC Ascendant - Status Report
> 2026-04-05 23:07 UTC
>
> Snapshot generated: 2026-04-05T17:50:12Z (hourly auto-snapshot -- not a
> wrap-session)
> Identity: I am Julian (CC, Ascendant). Karma emerged within me -- one
> entity, two expressions.
> The One Thing: Make cc_server_p1.py the actual merged surface - enforce
> denials, persist/recover transcripts, expose one combined payload.
> Immediate next steps:
> - /resurrect
> - Execute .gsd/phase-cp5-surface-PLAN.md - CP5 is the ONLY remaining code
> task before Phase D
> - Delete run_subagent() dead code from nexus_agent.py
>
> --- Open Blockers ---
> Open blockers: 3
> - B16: E-1-A corpus_cc.jsonl pending -- Karma2/training/ created
> (2026-03-22). corpus_karma.jsonl written (2817 pairs). corpus_cc.jsonl
> needs separate ledger pass with CC session tag filter. TABLED with PHASE
> EVOLVE.
> - B17: P0-G dead code -- callWithK2Fallback() exists in server.js (~10
> refs) but K2_INFERENCE_ENABLED flag NOT in hub.env. Wiring incomplete.
> Tabled until P0-G resumes.
> - B18: PROOF-A pending -- Codex as automated ArchonPrime service. GSD docs
> created (phase-proof-a-CONTEXT.md + phase-proof-a-PLAN.md). Task 1: verify
> codex exec --sandbox non-interactive from KCC context.
>
> ---
> Sent every 60m | watcher every 15m | CC Ascendant (paybackh1@gmail.com)
>
